short_description.value: TEOChat is the first vision-language model (VLM) for temporal earth observation (EO) data, capable of engaging in conversations about temporal sequences of EO images. It is trained on TEOChatlas, a large instruction-following dataset with both single image and temporal EO tasks, and demonstrates strong spatial and temporal reasoning, outperforming prior VLMs and rivaling specialist models.

pretext_training_type.value: Instruction tuning (visual instruction tuning) with next-token cross-entropy loss

masking_strategy.value: None (no explicit masking, uses instruction tuning)

pretraining.value: Instruction-tuned on TEOChatlas, which includes both single image and temporal EO tasks from multiple datasets and sensors

temporal_resolution.value: variable (bitemporal, pentatemporal, multitemporal up to 8 images)

dataset.value: TEOChatlas (GeoChat Instruct, fMoW, xBD, S2Looking, QFabric)

value.value: Global (fMoW, xBD, S2Looking, QFabric, GeoChat Instruct cover worldwide locations)
Random inclusion of image resolution and sensor name in prompt

sampling.value: Random sampling of up to 8 images for long sequences; random sampling of shorter sequences from QFabric

application.value: Land use/land cover classification over time
Land use/land cover classification over time
Urban development monitoring, spatial change localization
Urban development monitoring, region-based change QA
